narrative:
Salem 2 (Oak Harbor) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 663 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
